articles.title: Puducherry Weather Today Sunday, Mar 01, 2026, Puducherry Temperature and Air Quality(AQI) - Business Today
articles.search_term: ("mercury soars" OR "mercury crosses" OR "temperature soars" OR "record temperature" OR "all-time high" OR "degrees Celsius" OR "maximum temperature" OR "hottest day") Puducherry
articles.full_text: Today’s minimum temperature in Puducherry is recorded at 22°c (degrees celsius), and the maximum temperature is expected to go as high as 31°c (degrees celsius). Throughout the day, the temperature is likely to hover around 31°c (degrees celsius). The wind will blow at the speed of 6.09, and with the gust of 8.56, it will blow at 124 degrees.The sun will rise at around 06:26 AM in the morning, and around 06:20 PM, it will set in the evening. As per the weekly weather forecast of Puducherry, the temperature expected on the different days of the week will be 31 degrees Celsius on Sunday, 30 degrees Celsius on Monday, 29 degrees Celsius on Tuesday, 29 degrees Celsius on Wednesday, 29 degrees Celsius on Thursday, 31 degrees Celsius on Friday and 31 degrees Celsius on Saturday.
